Description: Edificio Metrópolis in Madrid — the iconic building at the corner of Calle Alcalá and Gran Vía — with its striking dome and ornate façade glowing softly against the city skyline. I chose this because the building is one of Madrid’s most emblematic landmarks and instantly recognizable: it represents both the historic charm and urban pulse of the city.
